mapper.insert: INSERT INTO lawyer_settlement (order_id, lawyer_id, amount, status) VALUES (#{orderId}, #{lawyerId}, #{amount}, #{status})
mapper.select: SELECT id, order_id, lawyer_id, amount, status, settled_at, created_at FROM lawyer_settlement WHERE status = 0 ORDER BY created_at ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE lawyer_settlement SET status = 1, settled_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id} AND status = 0
